title: Digital wallet for the provisioning and management of tokens
abstract: Disclosed are methods and systems for associating payment card credentials with a companion application. In an embodiment, a consumer's mobile device processor receives an instruction to launch a companion application, displays a companion application user interface, and receives selection of an option to obtain payment card credentials from at least one wallet application. The process also includes displaying a list of payment card accounts associated with the selected wallet application for association with the companion application, receiving a selection of at least one payment card account, transmitting payment account credentials of the selected payment account to a wallet server computer, receiving a companion token representing a digitization of the selected payment card account from the wallet server computer, and associating the companion token with the companion application.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1 . A method for associating payment card credentials with a companion application, comprising: receiving, by a mobile device processor of a consumer's mobile device from an input component, an instruction to launch a companion application; displaying, by the mobile device processor on a display screen, a companion application user interface comprising an option to obtain payment card credentials from at least one wallet application; receiving, by the mobile device processor via the input component, selection of the option; displaying, by the mobile device processor on the display screen, a list of payment card accounts associated with the selected wallet application for selection by the user to associate with the companion application: receiving, by the mobile device processor via the input component, a selection of at least one payment card account to associate with the companion application; transmitting, by the mobile device processor to a wallet server computer, payment account credentials of the selected payment card account; receiving, by the mobile device processor from the wallet server computer, a companion token representing a digitization of the selected payment card account; and associating, by the mobile device processor, the companion token with the companion application. 2. The method of claim 1. further comprising, prior to displaying the list of payment card accounts associated with the wallet application: displaying, by the mobile device processor on the display screen, a prompt for the user to provide authentication data; receiving, by the mobile device processor via the input component, authentication data from the user; and 

 authenticating, by the mobile device processor, the user. 3. The method of claim 1, further comprising, prior to displaying the list of payment card accounts associated with the wallet application: displaying, by the mobile device processor on the display screen, a prompt for the user to provide authentication data; receiving, by the mobile device processor via the input component, input of authentication data from the user; determining, by the mobile device processor, that the authentication data input by the user is incorrect; and terminating, by the mobile device processor, the device token association process. 4. The method of claim 1, wherein the companion application user interface further comprises an option to manually enter payment card credentials. 5. The method of claim 1, wherein the companion application is associated with one of a consumer device, a merchant website, and a service website. 6. The method of claim 1 , wherein the companion application is associated with a consumer device, and further comprising: transmitting, by the mobile device processor, the companion token to the consumer device enabling the consumer to utilize the consumer device to conduct transactions. 7. A system for associating payment card credentials with a companion application, comprising: a consumer mobile device comprising a mobile device processor operably connected to a memory, an inpu component, and a display screen: 

 a consumer device operable for communications with the consumer mobile device; a wallet server computer operably connected to the consumer mobile device; an issuer financial institution computer operabl connected to the wallet server computer; a tokenization provider computer operably connected to the issuer FI computer; and a commerce platform computer operably connected to the wallet server computer and to the tokenization provider computer; wherein the memory of the consumer mobile device comprises instructions configured to cause the mobile device processor to: receive, via the input component, an instruction to launch a companion application: display, on the display screen, a companion application user interlace comprising an option to obtain payment card credentials from at least one wallet application; receive via the input component, selection of the option; display, on the display screen, a list of payment card accounts associated with the selected wallet application for selection by the user to associate with the companion application; receive via the input component, a selection of at least one payment card account to associate with the companion application; transmit payment account credentials of the selected payment card account to the wallet server computer: receive a companion token representing a digitization of the selected payment card account from the wallet server computer; and associate the companion token with the companion application. 8. The system of claim 7, wherein the memory of the consumer mobile device comprises further instructions, prior to the instructions for displaying the list of payment card accounts associated with the wallet application, configured to cause the mobile device processor to: display, on the display screen, a prompt for the user to provide authentication data; receive via the input component, authentication data from the user: and authenticate, by the mobile device processor, the user. 9. The system of claim 7, wherein the memory of the consumer mobile device comprises further instructions, prior to the instructions for displaying the list of payment card accounts associated with the wallet application, configured to cause the mobile device processor to: display, on the display screen, a prompt for the user to provide authentication data; receive, via the input component, authentication data input by the user; determine that the authentication data input by the user is incorrect; and terminate the device token association process. 10. The system of claim 7, wherein the display of the companion application user interface further comprises an option to manually enter payment card credentials. 1 1. The system of claim 1, wherein the companion application is associated with one of a consumer device, a merchant website, and a service website. 12. The system of claim 1 . wherein the companion application is associated with a consumer device, and wherein the memory of the consumer mobile device comprises further instructions configured to cause the mobile device processor to: 

 transmit the companion token to the consumer device enabling the consumer to utilize the consumer device to conduct transactions. 13. A method for associating payment card credentials with a companion application, comprising: receiving, by a mobile device processor of a consumer's mobile device from an input component, an instruction to launch a wallet application; displaying, by the mobile device processor on a display screen, a wallet application user interface comprising a list of available companion applications associated with at least one of available devices, applications and merchants; receiving, by the mobile device processor via the input component, selection of a companion application; displaying, by the mobile device processor on the display screen, a list of available payment card accounts of the wallet application for selection by the user to associate with the companion application; receiving, by the mobile device processor via the input component, a selection of at least one payment card account; transmitting, by the mobile device processor to a wallet server computer, pay ment account credentials of the selected payment card account; receiving, by the mobile device processor from the wallet server computer, a companion token representing a digitization of the selected payment card account; and associating, by the mobile device processor, the companion token with the companion application. 14. The method of claim 13, further comprising, prior to displaying the list of available payment card accounts: displaying, by the mobile device processor on the display screen, a prompt for the user to provide authentication data; 

 receiving, by the mobile device processor via the input component, authentication data from the user; and authenticating, by the mobile device processor, the user. 15. The method of claim 13. further comprising, prior to displaying the list of available payment card accounts: displaying, by the mobile device processor on the display screen, a prompt for the user to provide authentication data; receiving, by the mobile device processor via the input component, input of authentication data from the user; determining, by the mobile device processor, that the authentication data input by the user is incorrect; and terminating, by the mobile device processor, the device token association process. 16. The method of claim 13, wherein the companion application is associated with a consumer device, and further comprising: transmitting, by the mobile device processor, the companion token to the consumer device enabling the consumer to utilize the consumer device to conduct transactions. 17. A system for associating payment card credentials with a companion application, comprising: a consumer mobile device comprising a mobile device processor operably connected to a memory, an input component, and a display screen; a consumer device operable for communications with the consumer mobile device; a wallet server computer operably connected to the consumer mobile device; 

 an issuer financial institution computer operably connected to the wallet server computer; a tokenization provider computer operably connected to the issuer FI computer; and a commerce platform computer operably connected to the wallet server computer and to the tokenization provider computer; wherein the memory of the consumer mobile device comprises instructions configured to cause the mobile device processor to: receive via the input component, an instruction to launch a wallet application; display on the display screen, a wallet application user interface comprising a list of available companion applications associated with at least one of available devices, applications and merchants; receive, via the input component, selection of a companion application: display, on the display screen, a list of available payment card accounts of the wallet application for selection by the user to associate with the companion application; receive, via the input component, a selection of at least one payment card account; transmit payment account credentials of the selected payment card account to the wallet server computer; recei ve a companion token representing a digitization of the selected payment card account from the wallet server computer; and associate the companion token with the companion application. 18. The system of claim 18, wherein the memory of the consumer mobile device comprises further instructions, prior to the instructions for displaying the list of available payment card accounts, configured to cause the mobile device processor to: 

 display, on the display screen, a prompt for the user to provide authentication data; receive, via the input component, authentication data from the user; and authenticate the user. 19. The system of claim 18, wherein the memory of the consumer mobile device comprises further instructions, prior to the instructions for displaying the list of available payment card accounts, configured to cause the mobile device processor to: display, on the display screen, a prompt for the user to provide authentication data; receive, via the input component, input of authentication data from the user; determine that the authentication data input by the user is incorrect; and terminate the device token association process. 20. The system of claim 17, wherein the memory of the consumer mobile device comprises further instructions configured to cause the mobile device processor to transmit the companion token to the consumer device enabling the consumer to utilize the consumer device to conduct transactions.
